channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: Py Auto: Boost Dev Speed
item.description: Discover how to boost your development speed with Py Auto! Learn to automate repetitive tasks using Python for a more efficient workflow.

item.title: Top Free AI APIs
item.description: Discover top free AI APIs for developers, boost innovation without the cost.

item.title: Socket to Me
item.description: Build real-time apps with WebSockets. Learn how to create interactive experiences with instant updates.

item.title: Build WhatsApp
item.description: Learn to design a chat system like WhatsApp. Discover key features & architecture.

item.title: Think Like a Pro...
item.description: Learn system design interview skills from a senior engineer's perspective.

item.title: AI Life Hacks
item.description: Streamline your life with AI and Python. Discover automation hacks and boost productivity.

item.title: Blockchain: Beyond Hype
item.description: Discover real-world blockchain use cases beyond the hype

item.title: AI Agents 101
item.description: Discover AI agents: what they are, how they work, and their impact on industries.

item.title: 2026 Layoffs: The Truth
item.description: Uncover the truth behind 2026 tech layoffs: causes, impacts, and what's next.

item.title: Speed Up
item.description: Boost site speed with effective caching strategies that drive real performance gains.

item.title: React Showdown
item.description: Compare React, Next.js & Remix. Choose the best tool for your project.

item.title: Multi-Cloud: Smart?
item.description: Is multi-cloud a smart move or overkill? Explore the pros and cons in our latest blog post.

item.title: LLMs on CPU
item.description: Fine-tune LLMs without a GPU: Learn how to optimize performance on CPUs.

item.title: Digital Dreams Denied
item.description: Uncover why most digital transformations fail & what it takes to succeed

item.title: Log Management at Scale
item.description: Master log management at scale. Learn what works for efficient logging and error tracking.

item.title: Big Tech Exodus
item.description: Top devs ditch Big Tech. Find out why senior developers are leaving & what's next.

item.title: Fast TDD
item.description: Boost dev speed with Fast TDD, efficient testing without the slowdown.

item.title: Load Less...
item.description: Boost site speed with lazy loading & code splitting techniques.

item.title: Nomad Costs
item.description: Explore the unseen costs of digital nomad life and plan your adventure with accuracy.

item.title: Fix Issues First
item.description: Identify issues before users do. Learn proactive app monitoring strategies.
